name: Green Woodworking
description: Learn fresh, unseasoned wood carving using traditional hand tools like axes, drawknives, and shavehorses.
seoTitle: Green Woodworking Courses & Workshops UK | Learn Traditional Spoon Carving
seoDescription: Discover green woodworking courses near you. Study fresh birch carving, axe hewing, and sloyd knife techniques under organic wood craft experts.

name: Fine Cabinetry & Restoration
description: Master heirloom furniture restoration, traditional cabinet construction, and fine finishing techniques with french polish.
seoTitle: Cabinet Making Classes & Fine Restoration Courses UK
seoDescription: Develop carpentry joinery and hand-tool confidence. Master drawer building, walnut heirloom oil veneers, and French polishing cabinet classes.

name: Traditional Joinery & Timber-Framing
description: Understand raw structural engineering. Construct hand-cut mortise, tenon, and Japanese sliding interlock joints.
seoTitle: Traditional Joinery Classes & Japanese Carpentry Workshops
seoDescription: Master geometric wood locks, timber drafting, and Japanese sashimono joints without nails or screws. Register for advanced joinery workshops.

name: Furniture Making & Woodturning
description: Mount logs on spinning lathes, assemble hardwood Dovetail keepsake chests, and fabricate bespoke accent tables.
seoTitle: Custom Furniture Crafting & Woodturning Lathe Courses
seoDescription: Take the step to becoming a professional furniture craftsman. From hardwood selection to lathe spinning, shape beautiful bowls and shelves.

name: Instrument Making (Lutherie)
description: Learn the precise art of shaping tonewoods. Craft bespoke acoustic guitars, violins, and traditional folk instruments.
seoTitle: Instrument Making Classes & Lutherie Courses UK
seoDescription: Discover lutherie classes near you. Craft acoustic guitars, shape tonewoods, and build custom instruments with expert guidance.

name: Woodcarving & Sculpting
description: Create detailed relief carvings, sculptural figures, and ornamental designs using specialised gouges, V-tools, and chisels.
seoDescription: Master the art of 3D woodcarving. Join workshops covering relief carving, classical ornamentation, and figurative sculpture using hand chisels.

name: Marquetry & Veneering
description: Create stunning decorative patterns and pictures by applying thin slices of wood to furniture forms.
seoTitle: Marquetry Classes & Wood Veneering Courses UK
seoDescription: Learn the delicate craft of marquetry. Cut and assemble intricate veneer patterns, explore parquetry, and master traditional inlay techniques.

name: Wooden Boat Building
description: Discover traditional maritime carpentry. Learn lofting, planking, and steam bending to construct beautiful wooden vessels.
seoTitle: Wooden Boat Building Courses & Shipwright Classes UK
seoDescription: Experience the heritage of boat building. Master steam bending, clinker construction, and maritime joinery in specialized wooden boat workshops.
